description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat and angular roofline with a combination of white and dark gray exterior walls, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a spacious wooden deck. The property includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by palm trees and a landscaped patio area, enhancing its luxurious appeal. The front driveway accommodates two cars, with a dedicated garage and a paved entryway. The upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms and a balcony overlooking the pool. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The use of glass, wood, and concrete materials gives the bungalow a contemporary and inviting appearance.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with large glass windows, a flat roof, a pool, and a spacious wooden deck, featuring a sleek white and gray exterior.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear of the bungalow with the pool, wooden deck, palm trees, and large glass windows dominating the facade.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the driveway, garage, and front entrance, with visible cars and a partial view of the upper floor's open balcony.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the side elevation, showcasing the white walls, multiple windows, and the transition from the driveway to the deck area.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite side of the bungalow, emphasizing the expansive deck, pool, and the open upper floor layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
